user_query: My friends and I are planning a trip to Mexico and we want to stay informed about narco activities. Can you fetch all narco news in Mexico? Also, please search for news related to 'drug cartels' and 'border security' using the TRW - news API.

TaskList.description: Fetch all recent news related to narco activities in Mexico.
Search for news articles related to 'drug cartels' in Mexico.
Search for news articles related to 'border security' in Mexico.
